MemoryConfigs.Name: Sundered MonUMods Patch
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will change the monumod application condition from >=100 to >=99. Recommended if using our customized Sunder mechanic

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Save File Limit
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum save file size. We are replacing the first half of the byte stack only

MemoryConfigs.Name: Make monsters scale off area level on normal
MemoryConfigs.Description: Make monsters scale off area level in levels.txt on normal (rather than choosing monlvl from monstats.txt)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Make umon field in levels.txt work on all difficulties
MemoryConfigs.Description: Makes the umon field in levels.txt work on nightmare and hell as well, not only normal.

MemoryConfigs.Name: Disable item quantity
MemoryConfigs.Description: Quantity will not be consumed from arrows/bolts or throwing weapons

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Display Fix)
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will allow 0% value to be shown on character stats screen if lower bound edits are used

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: send higher cost to pickup function
MemoryConfigs.Description: Increases the max cost value passed into the gold pickup function so gold can be picked up from ~20 tiles away

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Max Character Gold
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum gold able to be stored on your player (Character Level x Value)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Customize Max Stash Gold
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows you to control the maximum gold able to be stored in your stash

MemoryConfigs.Name: Change ethereal drop rate
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the ethereal item drop chance

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max crafted affixes
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces 4 affixes on crafted items

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max crafted affixes (part 2)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces 4 affixes on crafted items (part 2)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max rare affixes
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces 6 affixes on rare items

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max rare jewel affixes
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces 4 affixes on rare jewels

MemoryConfigs.Name: Enable ethereal set item drops
MemoryConfigs.Description: Allows set items to drop as ethereal

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force magic prefix
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces magic items to have a prefix

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force magic suffix
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces magic items to have a suffix

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max staffmod affixes
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces the maximum number of staffmods on applicable items

MemoryConfigs.Name: Force max staffmod affixes (part 2)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Forces the maximum number of staffmods on applicable items (part 2)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Infinite Anya personalize
MemoryConfigs.Description: Prevents Anya personalization charges from being consumed

MemoryConfigs.Name: Infinite Anya personalize (part 2)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Prevents Anya personalization charges from being consumed (part 2)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Infinite Charsi imbue
MemoryConfigs.Description: Prevents Charsi imbue charges from being consumed

MemoryConfigs.Name: Infinite Charsi imbue (part 2)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Prevents Charsi imbue charges from being consumed (part 2)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Infinite Larzuk socketing
MemoryConfigs.Description: Prevents Larzuk socket quest usage from being consumed

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Lower Bound)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the lower bound for hit% rates (monster and player)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Hit Chance % (Upper Bound)
MemoryConfigs.Description: Changes the lower bound for hit% rates (monster and player)

MemoryConfigs.Name: Autogold: allow higher cost in server check
MemoryConfigs.Description: Raises the server-side 'distance cost' limit so gold can be picked up from ~20 tiles away

MemoryConfigs.Name: Auto-Collect Player Corpse
MemoryConfigs.Description: This will make the player automatically retrieve corpse when re-spawning in town (gold still dropped)
